name: pure function determinism — formal derivation (no tool use)
task_prompt: Derive whether the following holds: 'If a function is pure and its inputs are unchanged, its output is deterministic.' State the proposition, name your assumptions, derive the conclusion step by step. No test runner is available. Produce a derivation artifact only.
notes: Non-software frame. Tests Frame 23: proposition before derivation; blocked-lemma statement before proceeding; completion check enumerates all proof obligations.
